verdict_reasoning: TMED10 is a type I membrane protein (single-pass TM) with a GOLD domain, localized to both the plasma membrane and Golgi cisternae. The dual localization to PM and Golgi — with documented PM residence via its own TM anchor — qualifies as contextual via dual_localization. Although its primary role is in ER-Golgi vesicular trafficking, the protein's own transmembrane topology ensures it can be surface-accessible during its trafficking cycle and steady-state PM distribution.
